sourcesContent:
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; export default function Navbar() { const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [isSolutionsOpen, setIsSolutionsOpen] = useState(false); const [isLocationsOpen, setIsLocationsOpen] = useState(false); const [favoritesCount, setFavoritesCount] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { const updateFavorites = () => { try { const raw = localStorage.getItem('wn:favorites'); const favs = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : []; setFavoritesCount(favs.length); } catch { setFavoritesCount(0); } }; updateFavorites(); const interval = setInterval(updateFavorites, 1000); return () => clearInterval(interval); }, []); return (
{/* Logo */}
W
WorkNest Premium Workspaces
{/* Desktop Navigation */}
{isSolutionsOpen && (
setIsSolutionsOpen(true)} onMouseLeave={() => setIsSolutionsOpen(false)} >
Hot Desk
Flexible workspace access
Dedicated Desk
Your personal workspace
Private Office
Complete team workspace
Meeting Rooms
Professional meeting spaces
Enterprise Solutions
Custom workspace solutions
)}
{isLocationsOpen && (
setIsLocationsOpen(true)} onMouseLeave={() => setIsLocationsOpen(false)} >
Bengaluru
12 locations
Mumbai
8 locations
Delhi
6 locations
Pune
4 locations
Hyderabad
3 locations
)}
About Us Pricing Contact
{/* Right Side Actions */}
Favorites {favoritesCount > 0 && ( {favoritesCount > 9 ? '9+' : favoritesCount} )} {/* Phone Number */}
1800 123 777 888
{/* Auth Buttons */}
Log in Get in touch
{/* Mobile Menu Button */}
{/* Mobile Menu */} {isMenuOpen && (
Solutions
Hot Desk Dedicated Desk Private Office Meeting Rooms
Locations
Bengaluru Mumbai Delhi Pune
About Us Pricing Contact Favorites {favoritesCount > 0 && ( {favoritesCount > 9 ? '9+' : favoritesCount} )}
Log in Get in touch
)}
); }
